config.sys.app.logo.name: Branding - App Logo
config.sys.app.logo.remark: Controls the default logo URL for the login page and workspace.
config.sys.app.logoDark.name: Branding - Dark Logo
config.sys.app.name.name: Branding - App Name
config.sys.app.name.remark: Controls the browser title, login-page brand name, and workspace logo text.
config.sys.auth.loginPanelLayout.name: Login - Panel Layout
config.sys.auth.loginPanelLayout.remark: Controls the default login panel layout: panel-left, panel-center, or panel-right.
config.sys.auth.loginSubtitle.name: Login - Form Subtitle
config.sys.auth.loginSubtitle.remark: Controls the helper copy above the login form.
config.sys.auth.pageDesc.name: Login - Page Description
config.sys.auth.pageDesc.remark: Controls the description shown at the top of the login page.
config.sys.auth.pageTitle.name: Login - Page Title
config.sys.auth.pageTitle.remark: Controls the headline shown at the top of the login page.
config.sys.cron.logRetention.name: Cron - Log Retention Policy
config.sys.cron.logRetention.remark: Controls the default cleanup policy for cron logs in JSON format.
config.sys.cron.shellEnabled.name: Cron - Shell Mode Switch
config.sys.cron.shellEnabled.remark: Controls whether Shell-type scheduled jobs may be created, updated, and executed.
config.sys.jwt.expire.name: Authentication - JWT Expiration
config.sys.jwt.expire.remark: Controls the lifetime of newly issued JWT tokens using Go duration format such as 12h or 24h.
config.sys.login.ipBlacklist.name: Login - IP Blacklist
config.sys.login.ipBlacklist.remark: Blocks login from IPs or CIDR ranges separated by semicolons.
config.sys.session.timeout.name: Online User - Session Timeout
config.sys.session.timeout.remark: Controls the inactivity timeout for online sessions using Go duration format such as 30m or 24h.
config.sys.ui.layout.name: UI - Workspace Layout
config.sys.ui.layout.remark: Controls the default workspace layout mode.
config.sys.ui.theme.mode.name: UI - Theme Mode
config.sys.ui.theme.mode.remark: Controls the default theme mode: light, dark, or auto.
config.sys.ui.watermark.content.name: UI - Watermark Content
config.sys.ui.watermark.enabled.name: UI - Watermark Enabled
config.sys.ui.watermark.enabled.remark: Controls whether the workspace watermark is enabled.
config.sys.upload.maxSize.name: File Management - Upload Size Limit
config.sys.upload.maxSize.remark: Controls the maximum size of a single uploaded file in MB.

config.cron.log.retention.name: Scheduled Jobs - Execution Log Retention Policy
config.cron.log.retention.remark: Controls the default retention policy for scheduled-job execution logs. Use JSON: {"mode":"days|count|none","value":N}.
config.cron.shell.enabled.name: Scheduled Jobs - Global Shell Mode Switch
config.cron.shell.enabled.remark: Controls whether Shell-type jobs can be created, updated, triggered, and stopped. Supported values: true, false.
